title: For Khamenei’s funeral, a highly scripted show of public mourning and fury
summary_full: A regime that has survived months of attack by the United States and Israel is projecting a show of strength with enormous crowds and the reappearance of military leaders.
summary_public: A regime that has survived months of attack by the United States and Israel is projecting a show of strength with enormous crowds and the reappearance of military leaders.

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: attack by the United States and Israel
